PyTorchFastAPIv2.0

Architecting Alpha
through Deep Learning.

A PyTorch dual-model pipeline extracting structured signals from 8 engineered market features. Point it at any ticker and receive directional conviction — instantly.

Enter Sandbox →
Scroll
⬡

Dual-Track Neural Engine

Concurrent regressor for next-day alpha estimation paired with a binary classifier for 1-week directional momentum signals.

◈

Real-Time Inference Layer

FastAPI-powered edge scoring runs live feature extraction on any NYSE/NASDAQ ticker — weights locked on AAPL, generalised cross-asset.

◇

8-Dimensional Feature Matrix

RSI-14, multi-period returns, MA deviation ratios, realized volatility, and volume force — engineered for low-noise structural signal.
